reference: Hello, my fiancé and I are trying to conceive. My last regular period was on October two. We had unprotected sexual intercourse on the 15th. I had some bleeding starting on the 25th. It first started as a light pink color in discharge. The next day it was a steady flow for about half a day. After that, it became spotting and eventually disappeared. My period is not due until the 2nd or 3rd, around that time. Would I be getting my period again?
text: Hello, my exams are in our attendance and food. My last regular period was on October 2. He had unprotected sexual intercourse on the 16th; I had some bleeding starting on the 21st. It first started as a light pink color and discharged. The next day it was a steady flow for about half a day. After that, it became spotty and eventually disappeared. My period was not due until the 2nd or 3rd, and then that's gone. Do you and I be getting my period again?
